Metadata.title: WaitlistAI - The AI That Waits For You
Metadata.description: AGI-Ready. Quantum-Aligned. Currently Unavailable. Join 1,247,893 developers on the most exclusive waitlist in tech history.
Metadata.ogDescription: AGI-Ready. Quantum-Aligned. Currently Unavailable. The most exclusive waitlist in tech.
Metadata.twitterDescription: AGI-Ready. Quantum-Aligned. Currently Unavailable. Join the waitlist now.

Hero.tagline: The AI That Waits For You
Hero.subtitle: AGI-Ready · Quantum-Aligned · Next-Gen Paradigm · Currently Unavailable

Features.heading: Redefining the
Features.subheading: We leverage cutting-edge transformer architectures, reinforcement learning from human frustration (RLHF), and a proprietary Waitlist-as-a-Service (WaaS) infrastructure.
Features.quantumDesc: Queries processed across parallel universes simultaneously. Results may vary by timeline.
Features.agiDesc: Built for AGI compatibility once someone figures out what that actually means.
Features.neuralDesc: We optimize your neural pathways. Yours, not the model's. Side effects may include existential dread.
Features.infiniteDesc: Our context window contains the entire history of the universe. We just can't access most of it.
Features.zeroDesc: Industry-leading hallucination speed. Wrong answers delivered faster than ever before.
Features.blockchainDesc: Every token is verified on our proprietary blockchain. We're not sure why, but investors love it.

Pricing.heading: Simple,
Pricing.subheading: Every plan comes with unlimited waiting, guaranteed queue regression, and a sense of existential dread.

LeaderboardCTA.heading: Global Waiting Leaderboard
LeaderboardCTA.description: See who has wasted the most time on this completely meaningless waitlist. Spoiler: it could be you.

Invite.title: Enter Your Invite Code
Invite.description: Access requires a valid invite code from an existing member.
Invite.emptyError: Invite code cannot be empty. Obviously.
Invite.noCode: Don't have an invite code? Request one →
Invite.requestPrompt: To request an invite code, please enter your referral invite code:
Invite.requestParadox: Hmm. It seems you need an invite code to get an invite code.
Invite.error1: Invite code "{code}" has expired. It was valid for 0.003 seconds on March 14, 2025.
Invite.error2: This invite code belongs to a parallel universe. It is not valid in this timeline.
Invite.error3: Error 418: I'm a teapot. Also, this invite code is invalid.
Invite.error4: Invite code recognized, but your browser's User-Agent suggests insufficient enthusiasm.
Invite.error5: This code was revoked after the holder used it to generate a meme. Violation of ToS Section 42.
Invite.error6: Our quantum verification detected this code in a superposition of valid and invalid. It collapsed to invalid.

Captcha.explanation1: Verification failed. No images contained AGI. AGI does not exist yet.
Captcha.question2: Prove you are not an AI pretending to be human
Captcha.explanation2: Analysis complete. An AI would say exactly that. Verification inconclusive.
Captcha.question3: Solve this paradox: 'This statement is false'
Captcha.explanation3: Both answers are incorrect. This is by design. Welcome to AI ethics.
Captcha.textPlaceholder: Type your proof of consciousness here...
Captcha.textDisclaimer: Note: This response will be used to train our AI to better impersonate humans.

Queue.welcome: Welcome to the queue. Your initial position: #10,245
Queue.viewAnalysis: Why is my position going backwards? View Analysis →
Queue.msg1: A Tier-3 Quantum Subscriber has been prioritized above you.
Queue.msg2: The algorithm has recalibrated your position based on cosmic alignment.
Queue.msg3: A new batch of priority users has been inserted ahead of your position.
Queue.msg4: Your ranking has been temporarily adjusted due to server optimization.
Queue.msg5: An Enterprise VIP customer has entered the queue. Your position has shifted.
Queue.msg6: Our AI determined you can wait a little longer. Adjusting queue...
Queue.msg7: System maintenance complete. Queue positions have been... rearranged.
Queue.msg8: A blockchain verification event has reorganized the queue order.
Queue.msg9: Someone with more Twitter followers has been given priority access.
Queue.msg10: Your patience score has been noted. Queue position adjusted accordingly.

Rejection.title: AI Compatibility Report
Rejection.recommendationText: Based on our comprehensive analysis, you are not eligible for access at this time. Your Hype Susceptibility Index is concerning — you actually believed this might work. Please try again in

EasterEgg.unlocked: You have unlocked the highest level of access.
EasterEgg.touchGrass: Please take this code and go touch grass.
EasterEgg.realAgi: The real AGI was the friends we made along the way.

Leaderboard.title: Global Leaderboard
Leaderboard.description: A monument to human perseverance (or stubbornness). Ranked by who has wasted the most time on this completely pointless waitlist.
